description:
Unlock a secure, open-source calling experience with NovaDialer
📞 SMARTER CALLING, DESIGNED FOR CLARITY

NovaDial is a privacy-focused phone application built for users who want a clean, reliable, and efficient calling experience. Based on Fossify Phone and developed as an independent fork, NovaDial introduces significant improvements to call management, usability, and performance while remaining completely free and open source.

🔒 PRIVACY FIRST

Your phone app should work for you, not track you. NovaDial contains no ads, no trackers, no purchases, and no unnecessary data collection. Your call history, contacts, and communication remain under your control.

📋 REIMAGINED CALL HISTORY

NovaDial introduces a redesigned call history system focused on speed and usability.

Traditional call logs can become cluttered over time, displaying thousands of duplicate entries from the same contacts. NovaDial takes a different approach by organizing recent calls around unique callers instead of loading every historical call record at once.

Benefits include:

• Faster startup and smoother navigation
• Cleaner recent calls interface
• Reduced clutter from repeated call entries
• Dedicated call details page for each contact
• Complete call history available when needed

Instead of displaying hundreds of repeated entries from the same caller in the main recent calls view, NovaDial shows a concise overview of your communication history. Detailed call records remain accessible through the dedicated call details screen.

🎨 MODERN AND USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN

NovaDial introduces UI refinements focused on usability and clarity. The interface is designed to feel familiar while providing a more streamlined experience for daily phone usage.

⚡ FAST AND LIGHTWEIGHT

Built to be efficient and responsive, NovaDial minimizes unnecessary data processing in the dialer and recent calls screens, helping maintain a smooth experience even for users with large call histories.

🌍 FULLY OPEN SOURCE

NovaDial is open source software. Anyone can inspect the source code, contribute improvements, or help shape the future of the project.

❤️ COMMUNITY-DRIVEN DEVELOPMENT

NovaDial is an independent fork of Fossify Phone, created to improve the calling experience through focused development and user-driven enhancements.

Download NovaDial and enjoy a cleaner, faster, and more privacy-respecting phone experience.

Open-Source Code: https://www.github.com/dhilipmpms/NovaDial
